title: Opppy’s Drying Pan
description: Welcome to Opppy’s Drying Pan, a cobblemon modpack where you can battle and capture legendaries/mythicals with plenty of deco mods
body:
Welcome to Opppy’s Drying Pan, a cobblemon modpack where you can battle and capture legendaries/mythicals with plenty of deco mods 

In this Modpack you'll be able to find legendary monuments to summon in legendary/mystical cobblemon 
Opppy’s Drying Pan has a large selection of Pokemon to find with ATMxMSD ads in plenty that was not brought with base cobblemon 
So go on out and explore the world as there is plenty of cobblemon to catch battle and befriend to find

**Very important** do not forget to copy "ATM x MSD x LM [v3.0.0]" from the resource pack to the world's data pack
